svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(192, 0, 0), rgb(255, 167, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 722px; height: 1px; padding-top: 42px; margin-left: 20px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1F4E9C;
display: inline-block; font-size: 24px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei'; color: light-dark(#1F4E9C, #89b1f4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
